section_analysis.description: Rapid-fire delivery. Focus on specific inferiority comparisons. Very rhythmic piano.
Explosive emotional release. 'Kuraberarekko' motif. High syncopation.

lyrics.original: くらべられっ子 くらべられっ子 さあ
lyrics.meta: Signature motif. Repeated for obsessive emphasis.

lyrics.original: だから比べないで いや比べんな 私をほっといて
lyrics.romaji: Dakara kurabenaide iya kuraben na Watashi wo hottoite

stylistic_dna.vocal_texture: Rei - Sharp, rhythmic, emotive high notes
stylistic_dna.main_instrument: Jazz-fusion Electric Guitar, Piano, Fast Rock Drums
